'''鈭歯-ng-th''' ('''nangatha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hemolyse|hemolyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hemolyse|hemolyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-ng-th
|-
! Lemma
| nangatha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangathithi|nangathithi]] || [[word:nangathiji|nangathiji]] || [[word:nangathishi|nangathishi]] || [[word:nangathi|nangathi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangathuthuth|nangathuthuth]] || [[word:nangathujuj|nangathujuj]] || [[word:nangathushush|nangathushush]] || [[word:nangath|nangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangathuthu|nangathuthu]] || [[word:nangathuju|nangathuju]] || [[word:nangathushu|nangathushu]] || [[word:nangathu|nangathu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangathufuth|nangathufuth]] || [[word:nangathufuj|nangathufuj]] || [[word:nangathufush|nangathufush]] || [[word:nangathuf|nangathuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangathethe|nangathethe]] || [[word:nangatheje|nangatheje]] || [[word:nangatheshe|nangatheshe]] || [[word:nangathe|nangathe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangathothoth|nangathothoth]] || [[word:nangathojoj|nangathojoj]] || [[word:nangathoshosh|nangathoshosh]] || [[word:nangath|nangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangathotho|nangathotho]] || [[word:nangathojo|nangathojo]] || [[word:nangathosho|nangathosho]] || [[word:nangatho|nangatho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangathofoth|nangathofoth]] || [[word:nangathofoj|nangathofoj]] || [[word:nangathofosh|nangathofosh]] || [[word:nangathof|nangathof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nangath忙th忙|nangath忙th忙]] || [[word:nangath忙j忙|nangath忙j忙]] || [[word:nangath忙sh忙|nangath忙sh忙]] || [[word:nangath忙|nangath忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nangathathath|nangathathath]] || [[word:nangathajaj|nangathajaj]] || [[word:nangathashash|nangathashash]] || [[word:nangath|nangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nangathatha|nangathatha]] || [[word:nangathaja|nangathaja]] || [[word:nangathasha|nangathasha]] || [[word:nangatha|nangatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nangathafath|nangathafath]] || [[word:nangathafaj|nangathafaj]] || [[word:nangathafash|nangathafash]] || [[word:nangathaf|nangathaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nangathasha|nangathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonangathasha|gonangathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinangathasha|gokinangathasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nangathn眉sha|nangathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonangathnkn眉sha|gonangathnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinangathn眉sha|gokinangathn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nangathsh毛sha|nangathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonangathnksh毛sha|gonangathnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinangathsh毛sha|gokinangathsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangathrosha|nangathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangathnkrosha|gonangathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangathrosha|gokinangathrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nangathmusha|nangathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangathnkmusha|gonangathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangathmusha|gokinangathmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nangathsherasha|nangathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonangathnksherasha|gonangathnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinangathsherasha|gokinangathsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nangathngasha|nangathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonangathnkngasha|gonangathnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinangathngasha|gokinangathngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nangathyasha|nangathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonangathnkyasha|gonangathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinangathyasha|gokinangathyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nangathyamasha|nangathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonangathnkyamasha|gonangathnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinangathyamasha|gokinangathyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangathn眉sh毛sha|nangathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangathnkn眉sh毛sha|gonangathnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangathn眉sh毛sha|gokinangathn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangathn眉rosha|nangathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangathnkn眉rosha|gonangathnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangathn眉rosha|gokinangathn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangathn眉musha|nangathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangathnkn眉musha|gonangathnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangathn眉musha|gokinangathn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangathsh毛n眉sha|nangathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangathnksh毛n眉sha|gonangathnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangathsh毛n眉sha|gokinangathsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangathsh毛rosha|nangathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangathnksh毛rosha|gonangathnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangathsh毛rosha|gokinangathsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangathsh毛musha|nangathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangathnksh毛musha|gonangathnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangathsh毛musha|gokinangathsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangathron眉sha|nangathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangathnkron眉sha|gonangathnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangathron眉sha|gokinangathron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangathrosh毛sha|nangathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangathnkrosh毛sha|gonangathnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangathrosh毛sha|gokinangathrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nangathromusha|nangathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonangathnkromusha|gonangathnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinangathromusha|gokinangathromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nangathmun眉sha|nangathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonangathnkmun眉sha|gonangathnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinangathmun眉sha|gokinangathmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nangathmush毛sha|nangathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonangathnkmush毛sha|gonangathnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinangathmush毛sha|gokinangathmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nangathmurosha|nangathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonangathnkmurosha|gonangathnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinangathmurosha|gokinangathmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nangath|nangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n忙ng忙th|n忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honangath|honangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hon忙ng忙th|hon忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonangath|hohonangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohon忙ng忙th|hohon忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉nangath|n眉nangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉n忙ng忙th|n眉n忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉nangath|n眉n眉nangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉n忙ng忙th|n眉n眉n忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂nangath|n茂nangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂n忙ng忙th|n茂n忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂nangath|n茂n茂nangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂n忙ng忙th|n茂n茂n忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunangath|lunangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lun忙ng忙th|lun忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunangath|lulunangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulun忙ng忙th|lulun忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linangath|linangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lin忙ng忙th|lin忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinangath|lilinangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilin忙ng忙th|lilin忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konangath|konangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kon忙ng忙th|kon忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonangath|kokonangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokon忙ng忙th|kokon忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenangath|kenangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ken忙ng忙th|ken忙ng忙th]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenangath|kekenangath]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keken忙ng忙th|keken忙ng忙th]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
